title: Hloov Password
subtitle: Hloov kho koj tus account kev ruaj ntseg
currentPasswordPlaceholder: Sau tus password tam sim no
requirements: Yuav tsum muaj 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, tooj, & tshwj xeeb char

messages.error: Ib qho yuam kev tshwm sim. Thov rov sim dua.
messages.failed: Ua tsis tau tejyam hloov tshiab password
messages.mismatch: Cov password tshiab tsis sib xws
messages.required: Txhua qhov chaw yuav tsum muaj
messages.invalid: Tus password yuav tsum muaj tsawg kawg yog 8 tus cim, ib tus tsiaj ntawv loj, ib tus tsiaj ntawv me, ib tus lej thiab ib tus cim tshwj xeeb
